title: WEScheduler Dashboard
config_at_least_one_tag: At least one tag is required
config_display_name_placeholder: Optional display name (e.g. 次元日常)
config_general_body: Runtime path and dashboard locale settings shared by the local scheduler.
config_scheduling_body: Timing, cooldown, idle, CPU and fullscreen gates used by the controller.
config_restore_general_body: This will clear the draft Wallpaper Engine path and language back to backend defaults. It will not save until you click Save.
config_restore_scheduling_body: This will replace the Scheduling draft with backend defaults. It will not save until you click Save.
config_group_runtime_body: Connect the scheduler to the installed Wallpaper Engine executable.
config_we_path_body: Manual edits are saved only when the whole config draft is saved. Detection reads the current saved config and Steam libraries.
config_we_detect_empty: No Wallpaper Engine installation was detected.
config_group_locale_body: Dashboard language is read when the window opens.
config_language_body: Saved language takes effect the next time the Dashboard opens.
config_group_startup_body: Delay the first action while the desktop session settles.
config_group_switching_body: Throttle playlist changes and force stale sessions forward.
config_group_cycling_body: Control wallpaper cycling inside the active playlist.
config_group_idle_body: Require user inactivity before disruptive changes.
config_group_gates_body: Block actions during high CPU load or fullscreen work.
config_leave_body: Leaving Config will discard the current draft. Switching between Config sections keeps the draft.
config_loading_body: Fetching the current canonical config and backend defaults.
config_load_not_found_body: The dashboard cannot edit config until the scheduler config file exists.
config_load_invalid_body: Fix the raw config file first. The editor will not try to repair invalid JSON or schema errors.
config_load_http_body: The local dashboard API did not return a usable config document.
config_client_errors_summary: Fix the highlighted field errors before saving.
config_validation_failed_summary: The backend rejected the draft. Field errors are shown near the affected controls.
config_server_errors_summary: {count} backend field errors are shown in the matching sections.
dashboard_shell_subtitle: A diagnosis workbench for the local scheduler runtime.
dashboard_loading_body: Fetching the latest tick snapshots from the local dashboard API.
dashboard_error_body: Check that the local dashboard API is running, then retry the request.
dashboard_empty_body: The backend is reachable, but the current analysis window does not contain any tick snapshots yet.
dashboard_live_hint: Polling the analysis window every second.
dashboard_live_body: The analysis page stays aligned with the live analysis API and lets you inspect why the scheduler switched, held, cycled, or paused.
dashboard_disconnect_notice: Showing the last successful analysis window while reconnecting to the local API.
dashboard_snapshot_header_hint: Snapshot mode keeps the locked tick stable while live data continues to stream in.
dashboard_timeline_body: Similarity, gap, and active versus matched playlist tracks stay in one chart so you can scrub the scheduler path without leaving context.
dashboard_timeline_live_hint: Hover scrubs a historical tick. Click to freeze a snapshot, then focus the chart and use Left or Right to step the locked window.
dashboard_timeline_snapshot_hint: The snapshot window is frozen. Live ticks keep arriving in the background until you return to live mode.
dashboard_sense_body: These are the raw runtime signals the scheduler observed for the selected tick.
dashboard_think_body: Context vectors stay visible by default. High-density policy diagnostics collapse only after the dominant contributors.
dashboard_act_body: Top matches, controller gate decisions, and the final action are kept close together so the why stays obvious.
dashboard_fallbacks_summary: {count} source tags expanded through fallback edges
dashboard_policy_summary_activity_none: No activity rule matched the current window.
dashboard_policy_summary_weather_unavail: Weather input is unavailable for this tick.
dashboard_policy_summary_weather_unmappe: {weather} weather did not resolve to a mapped tag.
dashboard_controller_summary_paused: Scheduler pause short-circuited controller evaluation for this tick.
dashboard_controller_summary_no_evaluati: This tick did not produce a controller evaluation.
dashboard_controller_summary_blocked_coo: Controller blocked the operation because cooldown is still active.
dashboard_controller_summary_blocked_idl: Controller blocked the operation because idle time is still below threshold.
dashboard_controller_summary_blocked_cpu: Controller blocked the operation because CPU usage is above threshold.
dashboard_controller_summary_blocked_ful: Controller blocked the operation because fullscreen pause is active.
dashboard_reason_hold_same_playlist: The matched playlist is already active.
dashboard_reason_switch_allowed: A playlist switch was allowed and executed.
dashboard_reason_switch_blocked_cooldown: A playlist switch was blocked by cooldown.
dashboard_reason_switch_blocked_fullscre: A playlist switch was blocked by fullscreen pause.
dashboard_reason_switch_blocked_cpu: A playlist switch was blocked by CPU threshold.
dashboard_reason_switch_blocked_not_idle: A playlist switch was blocked because the user was not idle long enough.
dashboard_reason_cycle_allowed: A wallpaper cycle was allowed and executed.
dashboard_reason_cycle_blocked_cooldown: A wallpaper cycle was blocked by cooldown.
dashboard_reason_cycle_blocked_fullscree: A wallpaper cycle was blocked by fullscreen pause.
dashboard_reason_cycle_blocked_cpu: A wallpaper cycle was blocked by CPU threshold.
dashboard_reason_cycle_blocked_not_idle: A wallpaper cycle was blocked because the user was not idle long enough.
dashboard_weather_fresh: Weather is fresh for this tick.
sched_startup_delay_tip: Delay before first switch after startup
sched_idle_threshold_tip: User must be idle this long before switching
sched_cycle_cooldown_tip: Minimum interval between wallpaper cycles within a playlist
sched_force_after_tip: Force a switch if no change for this long
sched_cpu_threshold_tip: Defer switching when CPU exceeds this
sched_pause_on_fullscreen_tip: Pause switching when a fullscreen or presentation app is active
config_playlists_intro: Configure your Wallpaper Engine playlists and their tag affinities. Each playlist is matched against environmental signals using the tag vector space.
config_policies_intro: Manage environmental sensing policies. Each policy contributes a weighted signal to the playlist matching algorithm.
config_tags_intro: When a policy emits a tag not present in any playlist, energy cascades along fallback edges until a known tag is reached.
config_scheduling_intro: Control when and how playlist switches occur based on system conditions.
policy_weight_scale_tip: Global priority multiplier for this policy's signal
validation_need_tags: At least one tag is required
config_unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?
